heading: Effect of refusal to modify existing contracts
label: 618j Effect of refusal to modify existing contracts
text: Any contractor for energy from the project failing or refusing to execute a contract modifying its existing contract to conform to this subchapter shall continue to pay the rates and charges provided for in its existing contract, subject to such periodic readjustments as are therein provided, in all respects as if this subchapter had not been passed, and so far as necessary to support such existing contract all of the provisions of the Project Act [ et seq.] shall remain in effect, anything in this subchapter inconsistent therewith notwithstanding.43 U.S.C. 617
notes: References in TextThe Project Act, referred to in text, is defined in .section 618k of this title
